text: Active listening is fully concentrating on, understanding, and responding to what someone is saying — not just waiting for your turn to speak. Techniques: paraphrase ('What I'm hearing is...'), ask open questions, reflect feelings, avoid interrupting, use non-verbal cues (nodding, eye contact).
Empathic listening: understand their frame of reference — 'Seek first to understand, then to be understood.' Reflective listening: mirror back content and emotion.
